mapper.select: SELECT region_id AS regionId, region_name AS regionName, plot_count AS plotCount, tree_count AS treeCount, total_measured_volume AS totalMeasuredVolume, total_predicted_volume AS totalPredictedVolume, avg_error AS avgError FROM v_region_stats
SELECT plot_id AS plotId, plot_code AS plotCode, region_name AS regionName, tree_count AS treeCount, total_volume AS totalVolume, ai_predicted_volume AS aiPredictedVolume FROM v_plot_summary
SELECT s.common_name AS `name`, COUNT(t.tree_id) AS `value` FROM species s LEFT JOIN tree t ON s.species_id = t.species_id GROUP BY s.species_id, s.common_name ORDER BY s.common_name

SELECT s.common_name AS `name`, COALESCE(SUM(v.measured_volume), 0) AS `value` FROM species s LEFT JOIN tree t ON s.species_id = t.species_id LEFT JOIN volume v ON t.tree_id = v.tree_id GROUP BY s.species_id, s.common_name ORDER BY s.common_name
